senses.example: You don't have to apply so much make-up to your face.
senses.example_zh: 你不必在脸上涂那么多化妆品。

derivatives: application n. 申请;应用;敷用

senses.example: This part of the form is not applicable to foreign students.
senses.example_zh: 表格中的这一部分不适用于外国学生。

senses.example: The rule "Look before you leap" is always applicable.
senses.example_zh: “三思而后行”这一准则几乎任何时候都适用。

senses.example: Household electrical appliances made in China are very popular.
senses.example_zh: 中国国产家用电器非常受欢迎。

senses.def_zh: 企图，(为争取某物而作出的)努力
senses.example: a desperate bid to free herself from a loveless marriage
senses.example_zh: 为摆脱那段没有爱情的婚姻而作出的不顾一切的努力

senses.example: The company submitted a bid for the contract to clean the hospital. // They put in the highest bid for the house.
senses.example_zh: 该公司投标承包这所医院的清洁工作。// 他们为这幢房子出了最高价

senses.def_en: to offer or propose an amount as a price; to offer to do work for a particular price
senses.example: He bid 10 million dollars for Picasso's painting. // We have successfully bid for the contract.
senses.example_zh: 他为毕加索的画出价 1000 万美元。// 我们竞标成功,得到了这份合同。

senses.def_en: to utter greetings or good wishes

senses.example: Do as you are bidden. // I will do as you bid.
senses.example_zh: 按命令行事。// 我将照你吩咐的去做

entries.mnemonic: pro(before)+pose(放置)→把提案放在前面→提议

senses.example: He proposed that we should go for a walk.

senses.def_en: to suggest sb. for a job, position, office, etc.
senses.example: He was proposed as a candidate for the educational committee.
senses.example_zh: 他被推荐为教育委员会的候选人。

senses.example: I propose an early start tomorrow morning.
senses.example_zh: 我打算明天早上早点出发。

senses.example: He proposed to her, and she accepted.
It's her nature to be generous.
She was generous enough to overlook my little mistake.
senses.example_zh: 她非常宽宏大量,不计较我的小错误。

senses.def_en: larger or more than the usual size or amount
senses.example: The farmers receive generous subsidies from the government.
senses.example_zh: 农民们从政府那里得到大量的补贴。

senses.example: There are plentiful watermelons in the summer.
senses.example_zh: 夏季有大量的西瓜上市。

entries.mnemonic: ab(away)+und(涌上来)+ant→东西多溢出来→大量的

senses.example: We have abundant proof of his innocence.
senses.example_zh: 我们有充分的证据证明他是无辜的。

senses.example: The country is abundant in natural resources.

extras.content: The same disadvantages can apply to flat sharing, with the added difficulties that arise from deciding who pays for what, and in what proportion. 译文:合租公寓也存在同样的问题,另外还有谁来付账单、各付多少的问题。
